name: dev-team
description: Drive a single unit of work — one spec, ticket, finding, or change request — from spec to a committed, reviewed result with a dev team of coordinating agents: Dev to QA to Reviewer in a bounded cycle. Runs as an agent team when the harness supports one, else as coordinated subagents. Usable standalone for any rigorous change, or as the per-subtask engine behind implement-full-spec.
